monk_snap_strike.name: Snap Strike
monk_snap_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A lightning-fast palm strike. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Chi Pip.

palm_strike.name: Palm Strike
palm_strike.description: Setup: A focused strike that disrupts the target's internal flow. Generates 1 Chi Pip and applies [Off-Balance].

dragon_kick.name: Dragon Kick
dragon_kick.description: Payoff: A powerful, leaping kick infused with Chi. Consumes 5 Chi Pips to deal massive Physical damage.

chi_burst.name: Chi Burst
chi_burst.description: Payoff: Release a shockwave of internal energy. Consumes all current Chi to deal AOE damage and push enemies back.

meditation.name: Meditation
meditation.description: Defense: Focus your breath to center your mind. Restores 30% Stamina and grants [Evasive] for 4 ticks.

iron_fist.name: Iron Fist
iron_fist.description: Defense/Counter: Harden your defenses for the next strike. The next physical hit taken is reduced by 50% and grants 1 Chi.

flying_kick.name: Flying Kick
flying_kick.description: Mobility: Leap through the air to a target position.

empty_mind.name: Empty Mind
empty_mind.description: Utility/Signature: Enter a state of pure flow. For 10 ticks, Chi cannot be consumed (all Chi spenders are free).

monk_physiology.name: Monk Physiology
monk_physiology.description: Passive: Momentum Master. Your Evasion chance is increased by 2% for every current Chi Pip (Max 20%).
